tier_rationale: Massive TAM. Low-friction entry tier. High word-of-mouth coefficient. Feeds upgrade path into Fractional Executive and Agency Builder tiers.
tagline: A solo founder or freelancer who can't do everything alone but can't afford to hire.

psychographics.self_identity: I am my business. Every task falls on me.
psychographics.core_belief: If I stop moving, everything stops.
psychographics.fear: Burning out before I break through.
psychographics.ambition: Hit six figures without hiring a team.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Still feeling like an amateur next to 'real' businesses.

pain_points.pain: Wearing every hat — sales, delivery, admin, marketing
No time for marketing when delivery is full
Can't afford premium tools, stuck with fragmented free tier
No one to brainstorm or delegate to

desired_outcomes.outcome: A system that does the admin and marketing while I deliver
Predictable monthly revenue without constant hustle
Feeling less alone in the business

buying_triggers.trigger: Missed a lead because they were too busy to reply
Saw a peer hit a milestone they're stuck below
Cancelled a subscription because it wasn't pulling weight

objections.counter_angle: Show sub-$50 entry with a free trial; position as 'replaces 5 tools you already pay for'.

objections.objection: I don't have time to set it up
objections.counter_angle: 30-minute guided setup; first value in 24 hours.
Built for solo — every feature works with a team of one.

communication_preferences.vocabulary: Side hustle, solo, bootstrapped, indie, grind, ship
communication_preferences.proof_type: Raw numbers from real solo operators

conversion_path.awareness: Short-form video or X thread showing solo operator winning with a system
conversion_path.interest: Free assessment — 'what's breaking in your solo business'
